title: Punjabi University Patiala Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Punjabi University Patiala Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Punjabi University Patiala Result 2026 out for December 2025 and November 2025 semester exams including M.Pharmacy Sem-II (Re-appear), B.Tech (ECM) Sem-III, MA Defence Studies Sem-I, Diploma in Computer Engineering Sem-I and Certificate Course in Sri Guru Granth Sahib on the official website - results.pupexamination.ac.in. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Punjabi University Patiala result.

content.text: Punjabi University Patiala has officially released the latest semester results for various UG and PG courses for the December 2025 and November 2025 examination session on its result portal. The newly published results include M.Pharmacy Sem-II (Re-appear), B.Tech (E.C.M.) Sem-III, MA Defence Studies Sem-I (Private), Diploma in Computer Engineering Sem-I and the Certificate Course in Sri Guru Granth Sahib (3 Months Course). Punjabi University Patiala Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - results.pupexamination.ac.in.

Students who appeared in these semester exams can check and download their provisional result/marksheet by visiting the official result portal and entering their roll number or other required login credentials as mentioned on the admit card. After downloading the online marksheet, candidates are advised to carefully verify their personal details, subject-wise marks and result status and contact the Punjabi University examination branch immediately in case of any discrepancy.

sections.heading: Punjabi University Patiala Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Punjabi University Patiala has published the latest UG and PG semester results for the December 2025 and November 2025 session on its official result website, allowing students to access their marksheets online in a few simple steps. Candidates can log in to the result portal using their roll number or registration credentials to download their provisional result for academic reference and future use.

sections.heading: Punjabi University Patiala Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: Punjabi University Patiala has activated the direct links to check various UG, PG and certificate course results for the December 2025 and November 2025 semester examinations on its official result portal. Students can instantly view or download their Punjabi University Patiala Result 2026 for M.Pharmacy, B.Tech (E.C.M.), MA Defence Studies, Diploma in Computer Engineering and Certificate Course in Sri Guru Granth Sahib using the direct links given in the table below.

sections.heading: How To Download Punjabi University Patiala Result 2026 Online

content.text: Punjabi University Patiala has made the result download process simple and student friendly through its dedicated online result portal. Candidates only need their roll number or other examination credentials to access and download their provisional Punjabi University Patiala Result 2026.
Follow the steps given below to check Punjabi University Patiala Result 2026 online:

items: Visit the official result portal of Punjabi University Patiala at results.pupexamination.ac.in.

On the home page, look for the latest result links listed under the relevant course and semester (for example, M.Pharmacy Sem-II Re-appear, B.Tech (E.C.M.) Sem-III, MA Defence Studies Sem-I, Diploma in Computer Engineering Sem-I or Certificate Course in Sri Guru Granth Sahib).
Click on your course and semester result link to proceed to the result page.
Enter your roll number or other required login credentials correctly in the given fields as per the instructions on the screen.
Click on the submit button to view your Punjabi University Patiala Result 2026 on the screen.
Download the provisional marksheet and take a printout for future academic and official reference.

Carefully verify your name, roll number, course, subject-wise marks, total marks and result status; if any mismatch is found, contact the Punjabi University examination department immediately for clarification and correction.
